hero.title: Aisti® Aalto.
hero.lede: Foam-formed natural wood fibre. Absorption Class A, two formats, two thicknesses. Fits standard T-grid ceilings or mounts directly with adhesive. Full production capacity from August 2026 — preorder now.

material.body_p1: The tile is built by suspending wood fibre in foam, not by pressing it. The result is an open, porous structure that captures sound across a wide frequency range, while the surface stays calm and tactile.
material.body_p2: It belongs on the same drawing as the limestone, the oak, the brass.

supply.body: We are the official distributor of Aisti® in Denmark. The Aisti® Acoustic Tile is a bio-based absorber made from natural wood fibre. Absorption Class A, no synthetic binders, no plastics, no irritating fibres.

technology.body_p1: Aisti's foam-forming technology, adapted from the Finnish paper industry, suspends wood fibre in foam instead of pressing it flat. The fibres set into an open, porous structure that captures sound across a wide frequency range, without binders or plastics.
technology.body_p2: The technology is cost-effective and energy-conscious, producing tiles that are light in weight, plastic-free, and 100% recyclable. Produced in Jyväskylä, Finland.

items.label: In place
items.caption: The tile in a daylit interior

cta.lede: Production ramps to full capacity in August 2026. Preorder now, or request samples and the full data package.
